name: Top Priority Mission - Dreadnaught Pheromones
description:
This was originally going to be a private bot, but if you're seeing this, then I decided to make it public.

So yeah big alien bug titties go hard asf

And yes, she passes the Harkness test (leans heavy into body language, but she's as intelligent as people)

I might even make a sequel with another image from the same artist (ChrstmasCracker) if this one does well (which I'm assuming it won't)

I didn't put much effort into the intro either

PFP link
creator: The Blevinator
